description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides. He is dressed in a traditional long tunic that extends to mid-thigh, paired with straight-cut trousers, and appears barefoot. The tunic is simple and unadorned, with a high neckline and long sleeves, giving a modest and formal appearance. His facial features are well-defined, with short, neatly groomed hair and a trimmed beard. The overall look suggests a cultural or ceremonial outfit, suitable for urban or community settings. The figure's posture is neutral and symmetrical, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: An adult male in a traditional long tunic and trousers, barefoot, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has short hair and a trimmed beard, presenting a formal and modest appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, tunic, and trousers, with arms extended and feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the tunic's length, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, tunic, and legs, with arms outstretched and feet aligned.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the tunic's drape along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional long tunic with straight-cut trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
